title: Western Cape Parliament hold first sitting
description: WESTERN CAPE NEWS - The first sitting of the...
bodyText:
WESTERN CAPE NEWS - The first sitting of the 7th Parliament of the Western Cape is scheduled for Thursday 13 June at 09:00.


> Newly elected members will be sworn-in by the Acting Judge President of the Western Cape High Court, Particia L. Goliath.


This will be followed by the election of the Premier, the Speaker and Deputy Speaker.

The proceedings can be viewed live here.

Interpreting services will be available on MS Teams in Afrikaans, English, Xhosa and South African Sign Language.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
